notes: Prospect wrap-up Search, Create, and Apply operations moved from prospects.html to the Process Automation Trigger workflow.
Prospects page saves participant attributes and writes AFT_GCB_ProspectWrapupStatus=PENDING separately and last.
Multiple Prospect submissions are supported using a unique AFT_GCB_ProspectRequestId for every submission.
Current PROD configuration value 5 limits Contact Reason selection to five values.
Existing Chat Monitor, Hold/Resume, Hold Timer, OAuth/MFA recovery, transfer, greeting, and duplicate-control logic remain unchanged.

fileMetadata.author: Sivakumar Chandrahasu
purpose: GCB package manifest for page inventory, version, and routing reference.
Keeps package metadata aligned with the deployed static file set.
